sub_pixel_system.notes: Tactical grid-based RPG; sub-pixel precision not applicable to turn-based gameplay

special_mechanics.name: Grid-Based Movement
special_mechanics.description: Turn-based tactical movement on grid-based maps. Each unit class has assigned movement range and speed determined by their class. Terrain affects movement capabilities.

special_mechanics.name: Mounted Unit Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Mounted units can dismount to fight on-foot. Dismounting occurs automatically inside buildings. Dismounted units receive stat penalties and weapon swaps from lances/axes to swords.

special_mechanics.name: Fatigue System
special_mechanics.description: Characters accumulate fatigue with each action (attacking, opening chests, etc.). Exceeding fatigue threshold makes character unplayable in following chapter.

special_mechanics.name: Terrain Interaction
special_mechanics.description: Maps contain varied terrain (plains, mountains, etc.). Environment combined with unit abilities affects movement range and capabilities.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Tactical RPG with grid-based movement. Physical platformer mechanics (jump, gravity, acceleration) are not applicable. Movement parameters are class-based and terrain-dependent rather than frame-by-frame physics. No sub-pixel rendering relevant to game design.
